query_title: St Trinian's 2: The Legend of Fritton's Gold

recommendations.title: Othello
recommendations.overview: The evil Iago pretends to be friend of Othello in order to manipulate him to serve his own end in the film version of this Shakespeare classic.

recommendations.title: St Trinian's
recommendations.overview: When their beloved school is threatened with closure should the powers that be fail to raise the proper funds, the girls scheme to steal a priceless painting and use the profits to pull St. Trinian's out of the red.

recommendations.title: The Great Escaper
recommendations.overview: In the summer of 2014, a World War II veteran sneaks out of his care home to attend the 70th anniversary commemoration of the D-Day landings in Normandy.

recommendations.title: The Importance of Being Earnest
recommendations.overview: Two young gentlemen living in 1890s England use the same pseudonym ('Ernest') on the sly, which is fine until they both fall in love with women using that name, which leads to a comedy of mistaken identities.

recommendations.title: Dad's Army
recommendations.overview: A cinema remake of the classic sitcom Dad's Army (1968). The Walmington-on-Sea Home Guard platoon deal with a visiting female journalist and a German spy as World War II draws to its conclusion.

recommendations.title: An Ideal Husband
